contentCadence.purpose: Publish factual GCA project updates, Go China narrative notes, product-readiness updates, and community verification reminders without investment promises.

publishedPosts.title: GCA is building Go China Access
message: GCA is building Go China Access.
A fixed-supply Base token connecting the China macro story with future non-custodial quant risk tools, market education, and member access.
Not custody. No return promises. Not financial advice.
publishedPosts.claimBoundary: Launch positioning only; no listing, audit, price, or security-vendor approval claim.

publishedPosts.title: Building transparently on Base
message: GCA / Go China Access is building on Base: fixed-supply GCA, public docs, wallet verification, member access, and credits for future China-facing Web3 tools.
No return promises. Just building transparently.
publishedPosts.claimBoundary: Project update only; no market forecast, no return promise, no external audit claim.

publishedPosts.title: GCA build update
message: GCA / Go China Access build update.

GCA is live on Base Mainnet with an official GCA/USDT route, member access pages, read-only wallet balance checks, 100 credits / GCA Member ledger records, public team profile, BaseScan remediation tracker, brand kit, whitepaper, trust center, reviewer kit, and BaseScan Handoff.

Current focus: one clean owner-controlled BaseScan submission from support@gcagochina.com using the BaseScan Handoff and Chinese owner flow, plus consistent identity, links, pool route, and review status across platforms.
publishedPosts.currentStatusAfterPost: Tim Chen public professional profile evidence, the domain email setup plan, public evidence checklist, activation evidence packet, BaseScan Handoff, Chinese owner flow, and support@gcagochina.com mailbox are now ready. The final owner package was refreshed on 2026-06-06T11:10:54Z. The next step is one clean owner resubmission while waiting for BaseScan review and publication.
publishedPosts.claimBoundary: Build update only; no price forecast, no return promise, no external audit claim, and no BaseScan approval claim.

nextContentQueue.angle: Introduce GCA AI Quant Access, planned modules, live account/wallet/ledger foundation, and release gates.
Explain the public contract-control facts and the current boundary that no third-party audit has been completed yet.
Point users to official X, Telegram, website, contract, and verification pages before using any link.

safeMessagingRules: Use the official website, X, Telegram, contract address, and GCA/USDT route only.
Frame GCA as a fixed-supply Base token and concept-stage access layer for future China-facing Web3 tools.
State that account intake, read-only wallet verification, and eligible credit/member ledger records are live, while the 10,000 GCA member benefit remains manual review only.
State that no third-party audit has been completed unless an independent report is publicly available.
State that starter-depth liquidity can create high slippage and price impact.
doNotClaim: price targets, returns, market predictions, or unsupported investment-style claims
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval or permanent wallet-warning clearance without vendor confirmation
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, LP lock, reserve lock, vesting, buyback, or price support before verifiable evidence exists
